calendar.matters:
Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Aug-22-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jak Marquez, Esq. (415-977-0444 x.232) of Dowling & Marquez LLP for Plaintiff/Moving party PETITIONER TONY LAU .
Morgan Hui (415-279-4808) Defendant/opposing party, in Pro Per.
Cantonese Interpreter: Benjamin Giang

ARGUED. Plaintiff reports he did not receive notification re: Compliance with Tentative Ruling Rule. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER TONY LAU'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction is GRANTED. No opposition filed.
Order is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
